🚀 Big Launches.title: Travelers deploys AI-powered claims countrywide with OpenAI
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Travelers built an AI-powered Claim Assistant with OpenAI to guide customers through filing claims, provide 24/7 support, and scale operations during peak demand.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI released a set of six plug-ins aimed at specific jobs: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, and investment banking.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Microsoft Scout is a new AI personal assistant built on OpenClaw
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Much like Google, Microsoft is launching its own version of OpenClaw. Microsoft Scout is an always-on assistant that integrates into Microsoft 365 apps.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Microsoft Scout is a new AI personal assistant built on OpenClaw
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Much like Google, Microsoft is launching its own version of OpenClaw. Microsoft Scout is an always-on assistant that integrates into Microsoft 365 apps.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The class action lawsuit, filed in Seattle by Virginia resident Charles Sigwalt, claims that Ring's Familiar Faces feature stores images of passersby without consent.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Microsoft’s first advanced reasoning AI is here
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Microsoft announced a bunch of new in-house AI models at Build 2026, including a new "flagship" model: MAI-Thinking-1.

tool_of_day.title: Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing
tool_of_day.summary: An open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible AI practices, with companies like Microsoft and Google launching tools to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams and Amazon facing a class action lawsuit over Ring's facial-recognition feature.
